meta.title: About Chinese Culture Studio
meta.description: Learn about Chinese Culture Studio — our sources, methodology, and mission to make classical Chinese wisdom accessible.

whoWeAre.heading: Who We Are
whoWeAre.body: Chinese Culture Studio is a digital platform dedicated to making classical Chinese wisdom accessible to everyone. We combine algorithmic precision with authentic classical texts to provide Chinese naming, I Ching divination, auspicious date selection, and palm reading — available in English, Russian, Japanese, and Korean.

sources.heading: Sources & Methodology
sources.body1: All our I Ching readings are grounded in the Zhouyi (周易), the Book of Changes, a text dating back over 3,000 years to the Western Zhou dynasty. Each hexagram's judgment draws directly from the classical commentaries: the Tuan Zhuan (彖传, Commentary on the Judgment) and the Xiang Zhuan (象传, Great Image commentary), traditionally attributed to Confucius.
sources.body2: Our Chinese naming system applies Five Elements (Wu Xing) theory and classical naming conventions drawn from historical texts. The auspicious date selection uses traditional almanac (Tong Shu) methodology, and our palm reading draws from classical Chinese palmistry traditions.

expertise.heading: Expertise & Transparency
expertise.body: We believe in transparency about our methods. Every daily hexagram includes its full classical citation so you can verify the source. Our algorithms are based on documented traditional formulas, not opaque machine learning models. You can verify any reading against the original texts.

languages.heading: Available Languages
languages.body: We currently support English, Russian, Japanese, and Korean, with each language offering culturally appropriate translations of classical terms and concepts.

technology.heading: Technology
technology.body: Built with modern web technology (Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma ORM) and hosted on Render with a Neon PostgreSQL database. No personal data is sold or shared. Our privacy policy details our data handling practices.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: For questions, feedback, or privacy concerns, reach us at privacy@easternwisdom.app.

quickOracle.title: Quick Oracle
quickOracle.subtitle: An ancient Chinese method for instant answers. Ask anything — get a direct response.
quickOracle.questionPlaceholder: e.g. Should I take this job? Is now a good time to move?
quickOracle.disclaimer: For entertainment and cultural reflection. Not a substitute for professional advice.
quickOracle.error: The oracle is silent. Try again?
quickOracle.lunarDate: Based on the Chinese lunar calendar at this moment:
quickOracle.stepMonth: Start at {start}, count {count} steps for the lunar month → lands on {land}
quickOracle.stepDay: From {start}, count {count} steps for the lunar day → lands on {land}
quickOracle.stepHour: From {start}, count {count} steps for the hour → lands on {land}
quickOracle.methodNote: This is Xiao Liu Ren (小六壬), also called Ma Qian Ke (马前课) — a 1,000-year-old Chinese folk divination method using palm counting to get quick guidance.
quickOracle.upsellDesc: The I Ching offers 4,096 possible answers with full classical commentary — cast your own hexagram for a complete reading.
